meaning: vi.求助,诉诸,采取(某种手段等),常去n.凭借,手段,常去之地,胜地
examples: The resort is geared towards children.
It's a favourite resort for the rich and famous.
The resort is a playground of the rich and famous.
If they then resort to an estate agent, they will have spent more money, not less.
Take the turn off for the Kaluakoi Resort before Maunaloa and head south.
